title: Getting started
excerpt: description: Create a KV namespace, write key-value pairs, and read data from Workers KV using Wrangler or the dashboard. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/kv/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. Create a basic key-value store which stores the notification configuration of all users in an application, where each user may have `enabled` or `disabled` notifications. Workers KV provides low-latency, high-throughput global storage to your [Cloudflare Workers](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/) applications.…
